items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. Price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. He added the market is not fully recognizing Albemar

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB.US), the world largest lithium producer, noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing, contrasting with the irregularity of demand from electric vehicles. Grid energy storage is more evenly distributed globally, which is a very interesting

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean SQM (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi Investment opinion Buy
items.snippet: Citi raised investment opinion on Albemarle to Buy from High Risk. Target price $225. Market is underestimating growth potential. Global ESS battery production forecast 950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY), expanding to 1300 GWh by 2027 (+37%). Possibility of lithium market shifting to sig

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks have all risen, with Albemarle (ALB) in the US up 4.83%
items.snippet: Citi: positive catalysts emerging in lithium battery industry chain. Short-term inventory restocking cycle will provide strong price support. Battery pre-stocking wave expected in H2 2026 ahead of Chinese export tax rebate expiry in Jan 2027. Tight supply-demand: effective growth

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. RBC reiterated Outperform and boosted price target to $257 per share from $253. Lithium
